body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: CC nightly learning loop
body.description:
Verify CC nightly learning processes transcripts correctly and improves next-day context.

**What changed:** CC processes session transcripts automatically at night (3:30 AM), extracts feedback, updates memory, prepares context for next day.

**Predicted unintended effects:**
  - False positive feedback: script interprets random text as feedback
  - Stale patterns: outdated patterns clutter palace (no deprecation yet)
  - Transcript loading: if session log is not available, script errors
  - Idempotency: multiple runs might duplicate entries

**Signals to watch:**
  - Check: cc_nightly_learning.log shows 0 errors, process completes
  - Log: feedback_items extracted matches manual count (spot-check)
  - Verify: tomorrow's /context-load shows prepared briefing
  - Palace: no duplicate nodes, feedback tree grows cleanly
  - Next day: CC starts session with patterns and decisions from previous day visible

**Gate condition:** Check 2026-06-27 (14 days) or first morning after nightly script runs in prod.

**Affected files:** None — observation only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe transcript processing quality, context briefing accuracy
**Test plan:** no tests — observation ticket
